api_errors.name: Created
api_errors.description: The request completed successfully and a new resource was created.

api_errors.name: Accepted
api_errors.description: The request has been accepted for processing but is not yet complete.

api_errors.name: Bad Request
api_errors.description: The server could not understand the request.

api_errors.name: Unauthorized
api_errors.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

api_errors.name: Forbidden
api_errors.description: The server understood the request but refuses to authorize it.

api_errors.name: Not Found
api_errors.description: The requested resource could not be found.

api_errors.name: Request Timeout
api_errors.description: The server timed out waiting for the request.

api_errors.name: Conflict
api_errors.description: The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

api_errors.name: Unprocessable Entity
api_errors.description: The request is valid but contains invalid data.

api_errors.name: Internal Server Error
api_errors.description: The server encountered an unexpected error.

api_errors.name: Bad Gateway
api_errors.description: A gateway received an invalid response from an upstream server.

api_errors.name: Gateway Timeout
api_errors.description: A gateway did not receive a timely response from an upstream server.

api_errors.name: Insufficient Storage
api_errors.description: The server does not have enough storage to complete the request.

api_errors.name: Loop Detected
api_errors.description: The server detected an infinite processing loop.
